name: Sawgrass
description: Wetland stabilization intelligence dominating the Everglades through dense rhizome mat formation. Flexible blade architecture dissipates flood energy while maintaining structural integrity. Rapid post-burn regeneration from protected underground meristems integrates fire as a renewal mechanism. Root-zone nutrient sequestration builds soil through organic matter accumulation over millennia.

core_attributes.pattern: rhizome mat stabilization, flood resilience, fire-cycle integration, soil building
